content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 8, 0), (2, 7, 3), (3, 6, 5), (1, 5, 6), (4, 5, 9), (5, 6, 9), (1, 9, 10), (6, 8, 14), (0, 1, 15), (3, 4, 15), (3, 5, 17), (2, 5, 18), (3, 7, 18), (1, 6, 19), (2, 9, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 1 exactly at time 19.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (3, 8, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 7, 3) has node 2 and time 3. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 6, 5) has node 3 and time 5. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 5, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 5, 9) has node 4 and time 9. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 6, 9) has node 5 and time 9. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 9, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 8, 14) has node 6 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 1, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (3, 4, 15) has node 3 and time 15. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (3, 5, 17) has node 3 and time 17. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 5, 18) has node 2 and time 18. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 7, 18) has node 3 and time 18. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 6, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 9, 19) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 9.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 1 exactly at time 19.

Answer: [6, 8, 14, 9]
